item.title: One Bit
item.description: Get a distinctive look with ‘One Bit’, an original and versatile effect that uses a special type of dithering algorithm based on Blue Noise, similar to that used at the award-winning ‘Return of the Obra Dinn’.

item.title: Sprites Mojo
item.description: Editor From the editor you can create ‘Sprites Mojo’ effects in two different ways: creating sprites and creating materials.

item.title: Awesome GameDev
item.description: To add, remove or change things on the list, please send me a email with the request.

item.title: Design Patterns In Game Development
item.description: The solution is reusable and can be used to solve similar problems.

item.title: Introduction to Go
item.description: Go is a very old strategy game that consists of capturing pieces and winning territories.
